summary: Classified five open PRs independently as live inventory items. No shared canonical was selected, and no close, merge, fix, or security routing action is planned.

actions.reason: Focused, potentially useful contributor bug-fix PR with proof and tests; it is not a duplicate or low-signal closeout candidate, and merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Focused web UI bug-fix PR with tests but failing proof gate; keep it open for normal proof/maintainer follow-up rather than closing or treating it as a canonical fix.

Focused channel behavior PR, but message-delivery risk and failing proof mean it should remain open for proof/maintainer review; it is not a duplicate, superseded PR, or low-signal closeout candidate.
Maintainer-owned focused bug-fix PR with green proof belongs in normal maintainer review flow; merge is blocked by job frontmatter and no closure classification applies.
Focused contributor bug-fix PR with sufficient proof should stay open for maintainer review; no duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security-sensitive classification is supported.
